thesis_source: Table 4-5 (p.54) unit cost ₱19,800/m² × Table 5-2 floor area 918m² for mid-rise RCMRF archetype (Jeswani 2021). Per-archetype values in archetypes.yaml override this generic fallback at runtime.

Illustrative: assumes 3-month (90 calendar days) replacement at 8 workers × 73 days = ~584 worker-days = 4,672 worker-hours; rough order-of-magnitude for a mid-rise RC school. Per-archetype times in metadata override this at runtime.
